case_title: RAY PHAM VS. ALEXANDER GOLDSHTEYN et al

docket_entries.description: MINUTE ORDER RE: MINUTE ORDER DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SERVE BY PUBLICATION
